message:
feat(tests): Comprehensive unit test coverage for rch/main.rs and commands.rs

- Add 70+ CLI parsing tests for main.rs entry point
- Add 50+ tests for commands.rs JSON response types
- Add E2E test infrastructure (logging, harness, fixtures)
- Fix dead code warnings in rchd metrics module
- Fix formatting and clippy lints across codebase
- Fix lifetime issue in e2e harness start_daemon
- Close bead remote_compilation_helper-6b7

Tests cover:
- All CLI subcommands (daemon, workers, status, config, hook, etc.)
- Global flags (verbose, quiet, json, color)
- Error cases and edge cases
- JSON response serialization
- Error code constants

All 398+ tests pass, clippy clean, formatting verified.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
